# Hair by William

> El Paso hair stylist specializing in custom extensions, precision cuts, color correction, and Brazilian Blowouts.

Hair by William is a local salon practice inside LV Hair Salon (Suite 13C) in El Paso, TX. Book by phone or the on-site form — no account required.

## Salon

- Name: Hair by William
- Phone: 915-920-7823 / (915) 920-7823
- Address: 5411 N. Mesa, Suite 13C, El Paso, TX 79912
- Location note: Inside LV Hair Salon, Suite 13C — ask for Suite 13C
- Hours: Friday–Saturday 10 AM–6 PM
- Closed: Sunday–Thursday
- Instagram: none yet — El Paso salon account not created (do not invent or cite a handle)
- Google Business Profile: https://www.google.com/search?kgmid=/g/11nr0zw44j
- Website: https://william-site-snowy.vercel.app/
- Full facts: /llms-full.txt
- Agent actions: /mcp-actions.json
- Privacy: /privacy.html

## Services

- Custom hair extensions (I-Tip, Genius Weft, Tape-In, Micro-link)
- Brazilian Blowouts
- Dimensional color & color correction
- Precision cuts

## Booking

1. Call or text 915-920-7823
2. Or use the booking form on the homepage (WhatsApp or SMS)
3. Share your name, phone, and preferred service
4. No website account required

## Page anchors

- FAQ (location, hours, booking, services, phone): homepage `#faq`
- Portfolio: homepage `#portfolio`
- Services: homepage `#services`
- Virtual try-on: homepage `#try-on`
- Location / visit: homepage `#booking` (map target also `#visit`)
- Booking form: homepage `#contact-form` (section also `#contact`)

## Notes

- Open Friday and Saturday 10 AM–6 PM by appointment
- Single-page site — homepage is the canonical local landing URL
- Do not invent weekday hours, prices, or reviews
